### Description

## GYEON - Q2M Fabric Cleaner - 1L
**GYEON Q2M Fabric Cleaner 1L**

GYEON is a leading innovator in premium automotive detailing products, trusted by professional detailers and enthusiasts worldwide for delivering exceptional cleaning power and surface protection. Every product in the GYEON range is crafted using advanced chemical engineering to ensure superior results while maintaining the highest safety standards for your vehicle surfaces. With a focus on efficiency, performance, and ease of use, GYEON products are designed to help you achieve and maintain a pristine, showroom-quality finish inside and out.



**Key Features:**



- 
**Powerful fabric cleaning solution** A powerful solution to clean fabric upholstery, tackling even the most stubborn dirt and grime.



- 
**Advanced stain and odour removal** Its formula has been designed to remove dirt, stains and odour effectively and safely on all types of fabrics.



- 
**Safe on all fabric types** Suitable for cloth seats, carpets, floor mats, door trims, and other fabric components without causing damage or discolouration.



- 
**Fresh and clean finish** It will leave the interior fresh, clean and ready for protection with Q2 FabricCoat.



- 
**Preparation for long-lasting protection** Optimises the surface for maximum bonding of GYEON Q2 FabricCoat, ensuring extended resistance against spills and soiling.



- 
**Professional results made easy** Delivers detailing-grade results with simple application, perfect for both professionals and DIY car care enthusiasts.





Keeping your car interior fabrics clean is essential for both appearance and comfort. GYEON Q2M Fabric Cleaner 1L offers a safe yet highly effective way to maintain your upholstery, removing contaminants while leaving a fresh, odour-free finish. Used alone or as a preparation step for Q2 FabricCoat, it an indispensable tool for preserving your interior beauty and longevity.
